'''shokahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glacioisostatic|glacioisostatic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glacioisostatic|glacioisostatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shokahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shokahithi|shokahithi]] || [[word:shokahiji|shokahiji]] || [[word:shokahishi|shokahishi]] || [[word:shokahiki|shokahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shokahuthuthu|shokahuthuthu]] || [[word:shokahujuju|shokahujuju]] || [[word:shokahushushu|shokahushushu]] || [[word:shokahukuku|shokahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shokahuthu|shokahuthu]] || [[word:shokahuju|shokahuju]] || [[word:shokahushu|shokahushu]] || [[word:shokahuku|shokahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shokahufthuf|shokahufthuf]] || [[word:shokahufjuf|shokahufjuf]] || [[word:shokahufshuf|shokahufshuf]] || [[word:shokahufkuf|shokahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shokahethe|shokahethe]] || [[word:shokaheje|shokaheje]] || [[word:shokaheshe|shokaheshe]] || [[word:shokaheke|shokaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shokahothotho|shokahothotho]] || [[word:shokahojojo|shokahojojo]] || [[word:shokahoshosho|shokahoshosho]] || [[word:shokahokoko|shokahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shokahotho|shokahotho]] || [[word:shokahojo|shokahojo]] || [[word:shokahosho|shokahosho]] || [[word:shokahoko|shokahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shokahofthof|shokahofthof]] || [[word:shokahofjof|shokahofjof]] || [[word:shokahofshof|shokahofshof]] || [[word:shokahofkof|shokahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shokahïfthïf|shokahïfthïf]] || [[word:shokahïfjïf|shokahïfjïf]] || [[word:shokahïfshïf|shokahïfshïf]] || [[word:shokahïfkïf|shokahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shokahïfthïfthïf|shokahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shokahïfjïfjïf|shokahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shokahïfshïfshïf|shokahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shokahïfkïfkïf|shokahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shokahïfthïf|shokahïfthïf]] || [[word:shokahïfjïf|shokahïfjïf]] || [[word:shokahïfshïf|shokahïfshïf]] || [[word:shokahïfkïf|shokahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shokahïfthïf|shokahïfthïf]] || [[word:shokahïfjïf|shokahïfjïf]] || [[word:shokahïfshïf|shokahïfshïf]] || [[word:shokahïfkïf|shokahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shokahæthæ|shokahæthæ]] || [[word:shokahæjæ|shokahæjæ]] || [[word:shokahæshæ|shokahæshæ]] || [[word:shokahækæ|shokahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shokahathatha|shokahathatha]] || [[word:shokahajaja|shokahajaja]] || [[word:shokahashasha|shokahashasha]] || [[word:shokahakaka|shokahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shokahatha|shokahatha]] || [[word:shokahaja|shokahaja]] || [[word:shokahasha|shokahasha]] || [[word:shokahaka|shokahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shokahafthaf|shokahafthaf]] || [[word:shokahafjaf|shokahafjaf]] || [[word:shokahafshaf|shokahafshaf]] || [[word:shokahafkaf|shokahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shokahasha|shokahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shokahshësha|shokahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shokahrosha|shokahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shokahmusha|shokahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shokahyasha|shokahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshokahnkshësha|goshokahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshokahnkrosha|goshokahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshokahnkmusha|goshokahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshokahnkyasha|goshokahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shokakahasha|shokakahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shokakahshësha|shokakahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shokakahrosha|shokakahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shokakahmusha|shokakahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shokakahyasha|shokakahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshokakahnkshësha|goshokakahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshokakahnkrosha|goshokakahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshokakahnkmusha|goshokakahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshokakahnkyasha|goshokakahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shekæhasha|shekæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shekæhshësha|shekæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shekæhrosha|shekæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shekæhmusha|shekæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shekæhyasha|shekæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshekæhnkshësha|goshekæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshekæhnkrosha|goshekæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshekæhnkmusha|goshekæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshekæhnkyasha|goshekæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shokfahasha|shokfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shokfahshësha|shokfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shokfahrosha|shokfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shokfahmusha|shokfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shokfahyasha|shokfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshokfahnkshësha|goshokfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshokfahnkrosha|goshokfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshokfahnkmusha|goshokfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshokfahnkyasha|goshokfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
